x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Posting Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A posting feature that records a decrease in an account balance or an outflow of funds from an account.

Comment:
Example:
Withdrawal from a savings account

Payment made using a debit card

Loan repayment deducted from an account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Posting Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A posting feature that records an increase in an account balance or an inflow of funds into an account.

Comment:
Example:
Salary deposited into a bank account

Interest credited to a savings account

Refund received from a merchant

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Posting Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A posting feature used to correct, modify, or reconcile previously recorded transactions.

Comment:
Example:

Correcting an incorrect charge

Reversing a duplicated transaction

Manual balance correction by bank operations

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Posting Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A posting feature that cancels or reverses a previously posted transaction.

Comment:
Example:

Reversing an incorrect debit

Canceling a mistaken transfer

Reversing a duplicate payment

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accrual Posting Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A posting feature used to record accrued amounts such as interest or fees that accumulate over time but may not yet be settled.

Comment:
Example:

Daily interest accrued on a savings account

Accrued interest on a loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Posting Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A posting feature used to record service fees or charges applied to an account.

Comment:
Example:

Monthly account maintenance fee

ATM withdrawal fee

Late payment fee on a credit card

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Posting Feature
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A posting feature that records interest amounts applied to an account either as income or expense.

Comment:
Example:

Interest credited to a savings account

Interest charged on a loan balance
